icons.name: icon/check
icons.$renderNote: Inherits parent color. On Checked=Yes the parent Checkbox.box has fill base/primary (#5a35c0); the checkmark stroke uses currentColor which the renderer should set to base/primary-foreground (white #ffffff) via the text-color CSS property on the .checkmark wrapper.

figma.synonyms: tick, checkmark, confirm, done, approve, success, complete

usedBy.context: Visible when checked=Yes across all (state × type × controlPlacement) combinations (20 of 40 cells).
